en.bodyPlayAgainWarning: You can play levels again if you want to earn 3 stars!
en.titleRateTheGame: Hey, don’t forget to rate the game!
en.star_dontRepeatLevel: Try completing the level without resetting to checkpoints...
en.gameOverMessage: Game over, but don't worry you can try again!
en.046ca9e9:
The property that dictates if a material will float or not is called BUOYANCY. 

Usually, lighter materials will have high buoyancy and heavier materials lower, which means they will drown.
en.ab1a1e3b: Oh yes! I came here to visit my friend!
en.ffe302ef: It seems I got a bit lost…
en.feb519a4: The path ahead is full of hazards...
en.372794f5: Lucky me that I have a lot of materials!
en.176fb1bc: I just need to select the right ones.
en.4de9a05e: There a long way ahead! Let’s go.
en.56c008ae: That was amazing right? We learned sooo much!
en.d4f00387: I learned so much about materials in the way!
en.0ccd3ec0: I will tell you all about it later!
en.876dc202: Thank you so much for the help!
en.847db0db: I need to get to the end of the level, to achieve that we need to open the RED barrier!
en.4b308812: To open it we must press the button there. But it can be only pressed by a matter with the same property of it.
en.eef2e690: When you are ready, and the barrier is open press “Move” and I will start walking!
en.bodyInertiaTutorial_sand:
Did you know? Everything in our world is made of matter. And matter has multiple properties like: Texture, Mass, Color and more!

There are multiple tools to measure these properties, and some of them can be just observed like colour!
en.0ed6519c: Oops, that’s not right! We need a material with the same COLOUR as the button.
en.5c8f21e3: You can click “RESTART” if you think you made a mistake.
en.017acb47: Oh no! Now we have water in the way.
en.28a82602: I need a material that will FLOAT so that I can cross.
en.04353614: Walking on wood felt different than walking on grass.
en.ae8423c0:
Did you know? Everything in our world is made of matter. And matter has multiple properties like: Texture, Mass, Color and more!


There are multiple tools to measure these properties, and some of them can be just observed like colour!
en.b246b088:
Another property of matter is TEXTURE, texture can be observed with the eyes or by touching the object. 

Each material has a different texture and it will dictate how other objects interact with it.
en.21a52b06: That rock will block my way if it falls.
en.16662997: We need a hard enough material that can stop it from falling.
en.3c260328: Hardness is another property of matter, it dictates how resistant the material is, and how much weight it can handle.
en.50bb56ce: Did you know? Size is a property of matter, however, the same material can have multiple sizes.
en.897f43a9: Like the stell pieces we used here!
en.3b807d3a: I fell in this hole! Now I need to be lifted back.
en.f1057b86: We can do that by putting enough weight on the other side.
en.61b41cfd:
Did you know?  What we saw is the same behaviour as a balance, we use it to measure WEIGHT, which is another property of matter. 

The robot was lifted because the material on the other side was heavier than it.
en.f65790df: Some materials dissolve in liquids. That means they are no longer visible or separable from the liquid they mixed with.
en.156671a8: Oh! ELECTRICITY! I know this one well!
en.2685f15d: We need a material that will CONDUCT the electricity to the other barrier, so it opens.
en.e7811931: We also need to be careful of the lava pool! We need a material that will not HEAT UP because of it.
en.8d73c838:
We just saw another 2 new properties of matter, ELECTRICAL and THERMAL CONDUCTIVITY, which means how well a material will conduct something. 

Metals are good at conducting both of them.
Rock is not good with either of them.
And plastic is not good with electricity, but very good with termal.
en.a691a185: Maybe the barrier will open if we REFLECT the like into the button.
en.09378696: We also need to move this ramp closer to the wall…
en.76cba019: We need a material that will be affected by the magnet!
en.36eacc7d:
We just saw 2 properties of matter: REFLECTIVITY and MAGNECTIVITY!

REFLECTIVITY means the material can reflect light. Like a mirror, if you look at it you can see yourself.

MAGNECTIVITY means the material is reactive to magnets. Usually, those are mostly metals like steel.
en.cf5a5224:
We just saw a lot of behaviours happening because of TEMPERATURE! 

First, the water BOILED because of the high temperature! 
Then the ice MELTED because of the high temperature in contact with it. 
Lastly the water FROOZE because of the low temperature.
en.8b80f34e: New lights! These ones seem to also have TEMPERATURE.
en.8f9e52c3: Meaning, they can HEAT UP and COOL DOWN other materials that come in contact with it.
en.cca62d3a: Did you know? Temperature can be measured by thermometers.
